purpose: provide one signed, falsifiable emit path for every vault script

human_view.purpose: provide one signed, falsifiable emit path for every vault script
human_view.what_was_discovered: A shared dual-view certificate (machine_view + human_view) now exists; any script can memorialize its run in one call.
human_view.why_believed: Lifts the shape already proven in examples/certificates/*.json into a reusable function that refuses claims with no stated falsifier.
human_view.what_would_falsify: A certificate that emits despite an empty what_would_falsify field would break the honesty guarantee.
human_view.confidence: high (gate is enforced in code, demonstrated below)
